title: Valid Palindrome II
description: Có thể xóa tối đa một ký tự để chuỗi alphanumeric palindrome?
approach: Two pointers; skip mismatch try left or right once.
memoryTip: Valid palindrome II — two pointers one skip.

solutions.c: bool validPalindrome680(char* s){ int l=0,r=strlen(s)-1; int used=0; while(l<r){ if(s[l]!=s[r]){ if(used)return 0; used=1; if(s[l+1]==s[r])l++; else r--; } else{l++;r--;} } return 1; }

analysis.correctness: At most one deletion — try skip left or right on first mismatch.
